mapper.select: SELECT * FROM store WHERE store_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{storeName},'%')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, POW((longitude - #{longitude}) * COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})),2) + POW(latitude - #{latitude},2) as distance_squared FROM store WHERE longitude - #{longitude} BETWEEN -0.07 AND 0.07 AND latitude - #{latitude} BETWEEN -0.05 AND 0.05 /* 대충 가로 세로 5km 상자 영역*/ ) WHERE distance_squared < 0.0025 ORDER BY distance_squared
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO store( owner_member_idx, store_name, store_description, store_phone, minimum_order_amount, store_address1, store_address2, supports_delivery, supports_onsite, store_status, longitude, latitude ) VALUES ( #{ownerMemberIdx}, #{storeName}, #{storeDescription}, #{storePhone}, #{minimumOrderAmount}, #{storeAddress1}, #{storeAddress2}, #{supportsDelivery}, #{supportsOnsite}, 'ACTIVE', #{longitude}, #{latitude} )
mapper.update: UPDATE store SET store_name = #{storeName}, store_description = #{storeDescription}, store_phone = #{storePhone}, minimum_order_amount= #{minimumOrderAmount}, store_address1 = #{storeAddress1}, store_address2 = #{storeAddress2}, supports_delivery = #{supportsDelivery}, supports_onsite = #{supportsOnsite}, longitude = #{longitude}, latitude = #{latitude} WHERE store_idx = #{storeIdx}
